subject: New Request: Platform Engineer – Gaming
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: NordPlay
ROLE: Junior Platform Engineer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 12 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / hybrid
RATE: 675 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Go, AWS, Docker, Redis and RabbitMQ.

Key requirements:
• Go
• AWS
• Docker
• Redis
• RabbitMQ

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Anna Berg
Senior Recruitment Consultant
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 72 123 45 67
